summary: TWO_COLUMN singular-map intuition. Left: a YELLOW line of different input points is shown on the plane, then ApplyMatrix with det(A)=0 collapses that whole family to one output point; a RED target off the output line is added to show an unreachable vector. Right: the panel ties this to Ax=v, det(A)=0, many-to-one collapse, and no-solution targets.
